_comment: Phase-0 instrument freeze for the keystone depth-vs-truth experiment. Read from the pipeline, not assumed. Frozen with PREREG.md at staging commit. No correctness statistic derives from this file.

depth_metric.definition: mean of circuit_tracer.attribute(prompt, model, attribution_targets=[target], batch_size=16, max_feature_nodes=500, offload='cpu').active_features[:, 0] (the layer index of each active feature node)
depth_metric.reuse: verbatim; this experiment validates the instrument, it does not modify it

sae.layers: preset default (all layers); resolved manifest dumped to results/sae_manifest.json at first load

amendments_pending.A1_adaptation_freeze: UNSET (answer-token span selection + aggregation, from pilot, §1)
